channel.title: journal on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in journal on Have an average day :|

item.title: I started a new journal today.
item.description: I started a new journal today. This is the first time I&# 146;m using nice paper in hardback book. It feels right. I opted for a larger one because I figure it will last longer. I will most likely buy a smaller one if I need something portable. I would love a Moleskine but I don&# 146;t think that is going to happen now. If you are looking for a new journal walmart has the mead deluxe journal for about $12.
